full_text:
Liu Qian 劉虔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Qian (劉虔)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Liu Shan’s seventh son. Given his fiefdom in 259 but said to be of unremarkable talent. Liu Qian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
